creator: mpp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Lars Koeller wrote:
> 
> >Synopsis:       Wrong location of 'magic' in the 'file' man page
> >Description:
> 
>    The location of the file 'magic' previously  located in /etc and used by
>    the 'file' commant has now  changed to /usr/share/misc/magic. The 'file'
>    manpage still stated it at /etc/magic!

/etc/magic still exists as a symlink to /usr/share/misc/magic.
Since /etc/magic is the "historical" location of this file, I am
somewhat reluctant to change the man page.  Comments?
-- 
Mike Pritchard
mpp@FreeBSD.org
"Go that way.  Really fast.  If something gets in your way, turn"
